{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017120829420E85B72E737DCD58"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617489426209571609","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一路追更，写的蛮有意思的，文笔成熟，叙事流畅。能感受到人物形象的立体。顾孟的爱情写的很纯真。能感受到家国大义下两人感情的渺小与珍贵。不过还是希望能多写一些两人感情的互动，或者可以当做番外。因为两人一开始更像友情，是怎么发展到爱情的过程写出来想必会更甜蜜。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773586440,"group_id":"7601464358488525848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1cZzBpAcEoY+qDeUFVEb149tR3DW8I8z08kv1D2xp63","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3287989603534587","user_name":"名噪一时的霍锦惜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3287989603534587","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601464358488525848","book_info":{"abstract":"双男主+穿越+病弱丞相+天之骄子+团宠+深情帝王
　　病弱内心无比强大受+深情帝王攻
文青版：你是我少年时的欢喜；你是我甘做飞蛾扑火的光焰。
励志版：孟翊穿越了，变成了国公府的二少爷，可惜是个病秧子，被人断言活不过三岁。但是他挣扎着活了下来，还成为了一国之相。
初见版：身为邻国质子的小殿下：你的剩饭能给我吃吗？　　
　　　　国公府病弱小少爷：呐......都给你
